basic_details.job_title: NISER Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Research Associate-I. Candidates with PhD in Chemistry Can Apply through Email. The application process closes on 24-05-2026. The candidate shall apply through the NISER website, www.niser.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Chemistry from a recognized institute

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NISER Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
